basic_details.job_title: ICAR-CRRI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Research Associate, Project Associate and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Research Associate-I, Project Associate-I, Laboratory Assistant
basic_details.short_information: ICAR - Central Rice Research Institute (ICAR-CRRI) Research Associate-I, Project Associate-I, and Laboratory Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website crridom.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the ICAR-CRRI Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Relaxable for SC, ST and OBC candidates as per Govt. of India norms

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. or Master's with 3 years research experience, Master's degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences, B.Sc. in Biological Science or 3 years diploma in engineering/agriculture
qualification.details: Research Associate-I: Ph.D. OR Master's Degree with 3/4 years of Bachelor's degree having 1st division or 60% marks or equivalent overall grade point average, with at least 3 years of research experience as evidenced from Fellowship / Associateship / Training/ other engagements and one research paper in Science Citation Indexed journal. Eligible Discipline: Agricultural Biotechnology / Biotechnology / Molecular Biology / Botany / Biochemistry / Life Science / Bioinformatics. Project Associate-I (PA-I): Master's degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences from a recognized University or equivalent. Eligible Discipline: Master's degree in Biological Science / Botany / Biotechnology / Plant Biotechnology / Bioinformatics / Microbiology / Molecular Biology / Biochemistry / Genetics Agriculture. Laboratory Assistant: B.Sc. in Biological Science / Botany / Biotechnology / Plant Biotechnology / Bioinformatics / Microbiology / Molecular Biology / Biochemistry / Genetics Agriculture or 3 years diploma in engineering and technology or agriculture related subjects.Age Limit All Posts: Age relaxable for SC, ST and OBC candidates as per Govt. of India norms.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 58,000/- p.m. + 18% HRA p.m. (Research Associate-I), Rs. 31,000/- p.m. + HRA or Rs. 25,000/- p.m. + HRA (Project Associate-I), Rs. 20,000/- p.m. + 18% HRA p.m. (Laboratory Assistant)
salary_details.details: Research Associate-I: Rs. 58,000/- p.m. + 18% HRA p.m. Project Associate-I (PA-I): Rs. 31,000/- p.m. + HRA (for candidates selected through National Eligibility Tests – CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship or GATE or selection process through National level examinations conducted by central Govt. departments and their agencies and institutions) or Rs. 25,000/- p.m. + HRA (for others) Laboratory Assistant: Rs. 20,000/- p.m. + 18% HRA p.m.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ICAR-CRRI?
faq.answer: ICAR-CRRI has announced a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Research Associate-I, Project Associate-I, and Laboratory Assistant.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post, ranging from a B.Sc. in Biological Science or a 3-year diploma for Laboratory Assistant, to a Master's degree for Project Associate-I, and a Ph.D. or Master's with significant research experience for Research Associate-I.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for ICAR-CRRI recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Research Associate-I post is Rs. 58,000/- per month plus 18% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age relaxation policy for SC/ST/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: Age relaxation for SC, ST, and OBC candidates is applicable as per the norms set by the Government of India.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the ICAR-CRRI located?
faq.answer: ICAR-CRRI is located in Cuttack, Odisha, with the pincode 753006.

faq.question: Q9. When are the walk-in interviews scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled for Project Associate-I on June 1, 2026, and for Research Associate-I and Laboratory Assistant on June 2, 2026.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable).
